gates.rule: If packet.status != ACCEPTED_FOR_CELL1, Cell 1 consumption is forbidden.
Accepted packet must cite review receipt.
Cell 1 may touch only target surfaces named by accepted packet.
Cell 1 must report what it actually did.
Cell 1 must return verification packet after probe/build.
Cell 1 must return handoff packet after verification or block.
Blocked Cell 1 must emit useful feedback, not bare failure.
Every inter-cell transition emits decision-edge observation sidecar.
Failed, blocked, stopped, or NA units emit unit feedback sidecar.
